description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the docker:latest Docker image with a docker:dind service. Define a single job named build (which runs in the default test stage) that executes a before_script installing python and py2-pip via apk, then installs docker-compose with pip, checks the version with docker-compose -v, and finally runs docker-compose -f docker-compose.debug.yml up as its script. No caches, artifacts, or conditional rules are defined.
